title: GEEPAS Electric Kettle | 1.7L Cordless Fast Boil Jug Kettle for Hot Water Tea or Coffee | Boil Dry Protection & Auto Shut Off | Illuminated Switch, Cord Storage | 1 Year Warranty, 2200W Black
features: ✅ FAST AND EFFICIENT BOIL TECHNOLOGY – Equipped with 2200W normal boil power, this electric kettle heats water within minutes for your tea, coffee, or cooking needs. Save valuable time every morning with its powerful heating element.

✅ SAFETY-FIRST DESIGN WITH AUTO SHUT-OFF-The advanced boil-dry protection prevents the smart kettle from operating without water, ensuring safety and preventing damage. Auto shut-off activates as soon as the water reaches boiling point, giving you peace of mind.

✅ LARGE 1.7L CAPACITY WITH CLEAR WATER LEVEL GAUGE-Boil up to 8 cups of water in one go with the generous 1.7L capacity, suitable for families or entertaining guests. The transparent water level window in portable kettle lets you measure accurately to avoid wasting energy. Always know exactly how much water you’re boiling for perfect portions.

✅ CORDLESS CONVENIENCE WITH FIXED BASE – Easily lift and serve from the fast boil kettle without dealing with tangled cords, thanks to its cordless design. The kettle lifts freely from the fixed base, offering smooth handling for both right and left-handed users. Store neatly with the built-in cord storage feature for a tidy countertop.

✅ EASY CLEANING WITH INTEGRATED WASHABLE FILTER – Keep your drinks tasting pure with the anti-scale filter in the cordless electric kettle that removes limescale particles effectively. The integrated filter is washable, helping maintain your kettle’s performance and prolong its lifespan.
✅ ONE-TOUCH LID OPENING – The one-touch lid opening feature in coffee kettle makes filling and cleaning quick and effortless. Adds a sleek, modern look to any kitchen décor.

✅ DURABLE BPA-FREE MATERIALS-Constructed with high-quality BPA-free components, this tea kettle is built to last and safe for daily use. The robust materials resist discoloration and wear, keeping your kettle looking new. Perfect for health-conscious buyers seeking a reliable and hygienic appliance.

✅ SMART CORD STORAGE AND COMPACT DESIGN-The integrated cord storage keeps your kitchen space neat and clutter-free. Compact yet spacious, this quick boil kettle fits easily on any kitchen counter without sacrificing capacity.
description: Product Description 1.7 L WATER CAPACITY The 1.7L large capacity allows this kettle to serve about 8 cups of water for you and your family each time. PERFECT POUR The perfect pour spout allows you to get a streaming flow of water straight into your cup. Say goodbye to splashes and spills on the kitchen worktop. RAPID BOIL TECHNOLOGY The boil-dry protection automatically switches off the heating element when there is no water in the water tank or if the water runs out during use. SAFETY PROTECTION When the kettle has finished boiling it will automatically turn itself off, preventing any damage. FAST AND EFFICIENT BOILING This electric kettle operates on 2200W and boils a full 1.7L pot of water in few minutes or less! It is much more energy-efficient than traditional stovetops or microwaves.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Versatile: For personal and professional use, including large households, offices, public spaces, travel, and outdoor activities.
